_meta.purpose: Ball-tracker tunables for sigmacorns.vision.tracker. Loaded by TrackerConfig.kt.
_meta.robot_frame: x = forward (+), y = left (+), z = up (+); origin at robot geometric center (matches sigmacorns.constants.RobotModelConstants.robotSize).

sources.FIELD_WIDTH_M, FIELD_HEIGHT_M: FTC DECODE 2025-2026 game manual (12 ft x 12 ft = 3.6576 m).
sources.ROBOT_FOOTPRINT_R: Derived from sigmacorns.constants.RobotModelConstants.robotSize = (0.367, 0.365). Axis-aligned rectangle at robot frame, +/- half-width.
sources.CAM_POS_R, CAM_*_RAD: Derived 2026-04-19 from user-measured offset (-346.081, -83.748, -242.268) mm of Cam Global Shutter from the back-left-bottom corner of the chassis (in Onshape Top Level frame), combined with STEP-extracted camera position (797, 0, 131) mm in Top Level frame. See config/cad/extraction_notes.md and tools/parse_step.py.
sources.K, DIST_COEFFS, IMAGE_*_PX: Calibrated 2026-04-22 via OpenCV checkerboard at 1280x720. Calibration was performed on right-side-up frames (calibrate.py applies cv2.rotate(img, ROTATE_180) before findChessboardCorners), matching the ROTATE_180 done by sigmacorns.vision.BallDetectionProcessor.processFrame, so values are used as-is on the device. The webcam MUST stream at 1280x720 (set via VisionPortal.Builder.setCameraResolution) or these intrinsics are wrong by the scale ratio.
sources.RAMP_POLYGON: PLACEHOLDER. Empty until ramp coordinates are pulled from the FTC DECODE field drawing.
sources.BALL_RADIUS_M: DECODE artifact (am-3376a) is a 70 mm OD ball; radius = 0.035 m. CONFIRM from current game manual.
sources.tuning constants (SIGMA_*, INIT_VEL_VAR,: Initial defaults from the Step-S33 prompt. Tune against BallTrackerSimTest noise sweep before changing in response to real-data RMS.
